message:
swarm: implement graceful shutdown support (bd-20q09)

Add GracefulShutdown method to SwarmOrchestrator that:
- Sends appropriate exit signals to all agents (Ctrl+C for Claude,
  /exit for Codex, Escape+Ctrl+C for Gemini)
- Waits for configurable graceful timeout before destroying sessions
- Supports force kill option to skip graceful exit
- Destroys all tmux sessions after agents exit

Implement `ntm swarm stop` CLI command:
- Discovers swarm sessions by pattern (defaults to cc_agents_*,
  cod_agents_*, gmi_agents_*)
- Supports --force for immediate destruction
- Supports --timeout for custom graceful exit wait
- Supports --json for machine-readable output
- Can target specific sessions via positional args

Add ShutdownFromPlan helper to shutdown all sessions in a SwarmPlan.

Add unit tests for graceful shutdown configuration and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
